response.original_title: 篠田あゆみが本気に変わる瞬間… Vol.2
response.overview: In the second volume of this series, Ayumi Shinoda—known for her stunning I-cup breasts and slender waist—reaches a breaking point. What begins as a scripted performance shifts into genuine pleasure as the intensity increases. Featuring three long-form scenes, the film captures the moment her "cute squeals" transform into authentic moans of ecstasy.
response.tagline: When the pleasure gets too deep, the acting stops.
response.title: 篠田あゆみが本気に変わる瞬間… Vol.2
